title: IT Infrastructure Engineer with 3 years EUC experience (Contract)
description:
[2 years contract, renewable]


About the Role

This role will involve in supporting all IT EUC activities and facilities, to ensure users can effectively and productively use established and / or new innovative collaboration technologies, maintain good user experience, including AI/ML, office automation tools, desktop, and mobility technologies.


Key Responsibilities:

1. Network Project Management

  • Lead end-to-end network infrastructure projects from initiation to closure
  • Develop project plans, timelines, and resource allocation strategies
  • Coordinate with internal teams, vendors, and stakeholders to ensure project deliverables
  • Manage project risks, issues, and change requests
  • Ensure projects are delivered on time, within budget, and meet quality standards
  • Conduct post-implementation reviews and lessons learned sessions

2. Network Architecture Review & Analysis

  • Review and evaluate vendor-proposed network architectures and designs
  • Conduct technical assessments of network solutions against business requirements
  • Analyse network topology, capacity planning, and scalability considerations
  • Validate security implementations and compliance with organisational policies
  • Provide detailed technical recommendations and improvement suggestions
  • Ensure proposed solutions align with enterprise architecture standards

3. Technical Consultation & Design

  • Provide expert technical consultation on network infrastructure matters
  • Develop network design specifications and technical documentation
  • Conduct feasibility studies for network modernisation initiatives
  • Support RFP/RFQ processes with technical requirements and evaluation criteria
  • Review and approve network implementation plans and procedures

4. Vendor Management & Oversight

  • Manage relationships with network solution vendors and service providers
  • Evaluate vendor capabilities and technical proposals
  • Oversee vendor performance and deliverable quality
  • Conduct technical discussions and negotiations with vendors
  • Ensure vendor compliance with contractual and technical requirements

5. Standards & Compliance

  • Ensure network implementations comply with security standards and policies
  • Maintain network documentation and configuration management
  • Implement network monitoring and performance management practices
  • Support audit activities and compliance reporting
  • Drive adoption of industry best practices and standards

Requirement:

· Bachelor’s degree in IT, Computer Science, or related field

· Minimum 3 years enterprise EUC experience

· Strong Windows 10/11 enterprise deployment expertise

· Proven experience with SCCM/Intune

· Active Directory and Group Policy management

· Experience in managing collaboration tools (Office 365, Video Conferencing) in a large enterprise setup

· Basic network infrastructure knowledge

· Microsoft 365 Certified: Modern Desktop Administrator Associate or equivalent

· Relevant technical certifications such as CompTIA A+

· ITIL Foundation preferred

· Skills PowerShell scripting

· Enterprise software deployment

· Security implementation

· Technical documentation

· Problem-solving capabilities

postedCompany.description:
We are an award-winning, full-service Web Solutions Company based in Singapore. Websparks Pte Ltd is formed in 2008.


Each of our Websparkers should be Curious, Collaborative, Committed, and a Challenger. We wake up daily to deliver extraordinary digital experiences to our customers.


Websparks is an ISO 27001 certified company. ISO/IEC 27001 is the leading international standard for information security management and helps organizations to keep information assets secure. Websparks is an ISO 9001:2015 certified company. We have demonstrated to external auditors our commitment to quality. We are able to consistently provide products and services that meet our client’s requirements.


Websparks is named as APN Select Consulting Partner as a result of our investment in technical resource development aimed at ensuring efficient usage of the AWS cloud. Websparks is certified as a Microsoft Gold Application Development, Silver Application Integration and DevOps Partner. We are equipped with the tools and resources to deliver the best quality of software.


Websparks is a Progress Gold Partner. As a Progress partner, we play a key role in helping organizations of all sizes – across all industries – transform and run their businesses. Websparks is a Sitecore Solution Partner.  Solution partners bring their customers' unique visions to dynamic life on their websites with the Sitecore Experience Platform.
postedCompany.name: WEBSPARKS PTE. LTD.
